insight: Watchdog stalls showing `PaperReflectionHolder.getDeclaredMethod` on Paper 1.21+/Leaf mean Foundation's `ReflectionUtil.getMethod` has no cache — Paper's reflection rewriter makes every uncached `getDeclaredMethod` very slow, and Protect calls it twice per `InventoryOpenEvent`. Fix: add a per-class `ConcurrentHashMap<String, Method>` cache (with a sentinel for negative lookups) in `getMethod`. Workaround: set `Scan.Inventory_Open: false`.
